name: @untacit/app
description: untacit desktop app: Tauri 2 shell + React frontend + Node sidecar exposing the core over a local HTTP API

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n sidecar,vite -c blue,green "tsx watch --tsconfig tsconfig.sidecar.json sidecar/server.ts" "vite"
scripts.bundle:sidecar: esbuild sidecar/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --external:@untacit/core --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=sidecar/dist/server.mjs
scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.sidecar.json --noEmit && vite build
